title: Version 2
content:
During the first year, there were thousands of things need to be done. The company's website doesn't seem to be in a high priority. Version 1 was very simple.

![][1]

Now that year 2 is coming, we need a website that really represent the company. And [THE designer][2] really did a very good job. And here's Version 2.

![][3]

We're moving ahead steadily.

[1]:https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/08/fpc-v1.jpg
[2]:http://iningz.net/
[3]:https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/08/fpc-v2.jpg
